title: Syngonanthus reclinatus
taxonomy: Syngonanthus reclinatus is a member of the family Vochysiaceae. This plant is classified as a species within the genus Syngonanthus. The classification of Syngonanthus reclinatus places it within the order Myrtales, which is a group of flowering plants.
